status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Scaffold harness-skills repo + submodule + validator
features.user_visible_behavior: harness-skills exists as submodule at .harness/skills-src with README, CATEGORIES.md, install.sh, scripts/validate.sh and caveman vendored via .gitmodules; validator passes.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f README.md && test -f CATEGORIES.md && test -x install.sh && test -x scripts/validate.sh && test -d vendor/caveman && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Core resources: mapping, autonomy, persona, token-budget, step-gate
features.user_visible_behavior: resources/ has agent-tool-mapping, autonomy-mode, persona-mode (dev vs non-tech), token-budget (caveman+compaction), step-gate; validator passes.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && for f in resources/agent-tool-mapping.md resources/autonomy-mode.md resources/persona-mode.md resources/token-budget.md resources/step-gate.md; do test -f "$f" || exit 1; done && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: workflow-intake: classify request + set persona/mode/collab
features.user_visible_behavior: skills/workflow-intake classifies into 4 routes, sets user_role + autonomy + solo/team, dispatches.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/workflow-intake/SKILL.md && grep -qi persona skills/workflow-intake/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: workflow-bootstrap: create project from a prompt
features.user_visible_behavior: workflow-bootstrap drives a greenfield prompt through the full lifecycle (BA->system design->UI->plan tasks->code->review->test(multi)->fixbug->deploy), step-gated and persona-aware.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 1 BA: plan-ba-analysis + plan-us-backlog (persona-aware)
features.user_visible_behavior: BA skills elicit requirements and produce a US backlog; behavior branches on user_role (non-tech=requirement-level, dev=exhaustive acceptance/edge/NFR).
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/plan-ba-analysis/SKILL.md && test -f skills/plan-us-backlog/SKILL.md && grep -qi persona skills/plan-ba-analysis/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 6 Review: code-review + pr-review + refactor (hard gate)
features.user_visible_behavior: Review skills produce real findings recorded to evidence ## Review; gate blocks verify on placeholders.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && for s in check-code-review check-pr-review check-refactor; do test -f skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Multi-agent projection in install.sh (claude/antigravity/codex)
features.user_visible_behavior: install.sh symlinks .claude/skills, generates .agent/workflows/harness-*, leaves codex path-based.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && grep -q .claude/skills install.sh && grep -q .agent/workflows install.sh && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Hooks layer + config-templates + per-agent hook wiring
features.user_visible_behavior: hooks/ holds all gate scripts incl persona-gate/step-gate/caveman-budget; config-templates wire them per agent; bash -n clean.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -d hooks && test -d config-templates && for h in hooks/*.sh; do bash -n "$h" || exit 1; done && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 2 System Design: architecture + database + api + detailed
features.user_visible_behavior: System design skills cover architecture, DB schema, API contracts and detailed/component design with design patterns.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && for s in design-architecture design-database design-api design-detailed; do test -f skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 4 Plan Tasks: plan-tasks + plan-skeleton (chốt test-strategy)
features.user_visible_behavior: Splits a US into child-tasks F<id>-T<n>, scaffolds skeleton, and freezes the per-task test-strategy into immutable verifications before start.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/plan-tasks/SKILL.md && test -f skills/plan-skeleton/SKILL.md && grep -qi test-strategy skills/plan-tasks/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 5 Code: dev-be/fe/cli/db/batch + language conventions
features.user_visible_behavior: Per-component developer skills implement code following language conventions.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && for s in dev-be dev-fe dev-cli dev-db dev-batch; do test -f skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done && test -d resources/conventions && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Phase 7 Test core: check-test-strategy + test-unit + test-integration
features.user_visible_behavior: test-strategy selects required test types from system requirements; UT always, IT when cross-component. Selection recorded into the task's verifications.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/check-test-strategy/SKILL.md && test -f skills/test-unit/SKILL.md && test -f skills/test-integration/SKILL.md && grep -qiE "regression|e2e|performance|security" skills/check-test-strategy/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Task-state maintenance: workflow checkpoints + task-state-guard hook
features.user_visible_behavior: Workflows update .harness/tasks/<id>.md at each phase boundary (expand template after start, tick [/]->[x], update Next step); a soft task-state-guard hook warns when task-state lags feature status; wired per agent.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f resources/task-state.md && test -f hooks/task-state-guard.sh && bash -n hooks/task-state-guard.sh && for w in workflow-intake workflow-bootstrap workflow-feature workflow-bugfix workflow-team; do grep -qi task-state skills/$w/SKILL.md || exit 1; done && grep -q task-state-guard config-templates/claude.settings.json && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Resumable bootstrap: track setup phases as an F00 feature + 2-tier phase split
features.user_visible_behavior: workflow-bootstrap creates+starts a bootstrap tracking feature (F00) at pre-flight so BA/design/UI progress lives in features.json + task-state and survives interrupt (harness resume continues); doc separates setup-once (under F00) from per-US phases.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && grep -qi "harness add F00" skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && grep -qi resum skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && grep -qi "per-US" skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Bootstrap Stage A as F00 child-tasks (F00-T1..T4), WIP-safe parent verify
features.user_visible_behavior: workflow-bootstrap always decomposes Stage A into child-tasks F00-T1 BA, F00-T2 design, F00-T3 UI, F00-T4 plan+skeleton; children run one-at-a-time (WIP=1), parent F00 started+verified only after all children pass; plan-tasks documents the setup decomposition.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && grep -q "F00-T" skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && grep -qi child-task skills/workflow-bootstrap/SKILL.md && grep -qiE "stage a|setup" skills/plan-tasks/SKILL.md && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Review-fix loop: independent reviewer + tracked findings + fix/re-review + gate
features.user_visible_behavior: check-review-loop runs an independent (adversarial) reviewer, records findings as a tracked checklist in evidence ## Review, drives a fix->re-review loop (capped+escalate), and a hard review-fix-gate hook blocks verify while any finding stays open.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f skills/check-review-loop/SKILL.md && test -f hooks/review-fix-gate.sh && bash -n hooks/review-fix-gate.sh && grep -qiE "independent|subagent" skills/check-review-loop/SKILL.md && grep -q review-fix-gate config-templates/claude.settings.json && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Skill depth standard + lint-depth + enrich review pair (reference example)
features.user_visible_behavior: resources/skill-depth-standard.md defines the deep-skill bar; scripts/lint-depth.sh checks a skill meets it; check-code-review is enriched to the bar with references/ (checklist, common-issues, report-template) and passes lint-depth.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && test -f resources/skill-depth-standard.md && test -x scripts/lint-depth.sh && test -d skills/check-code-review/references && bash scripts/lint-depth.sh check-code-review && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Enrich bugfix with debug-diagnose 6-phase methodology
features.user_visible_behavior: workflow-bugfix adopts the feedback-loop-first 6-phase structured debugging (ranked falsifiable hypotheses, gates) with references/; passes lint-depth.
verification: bash -c 'cd .harness/skills-src && grep -qi "feedback loop\|hypothes" skills/workflow-bugfix/SKILL.md && bash scripts/lint-depth.sh workflow-bugfix && bash scripts/validate.sh'

features.title: Add deep check-security-review skill + wire into strategy/review
